posts.author: kll (Kristen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Since files in support of the update discussion are housed in a separate tab of an update (where the update count is tracked at the top) – I would like to see a count of the files housed within the Item Update window for the item, to indicate something is saved there and prompt a review.

What are you trying to achieve

Including a file count at the header of the Updates screen will allow parties to take note of additional information that may already be uploaded. It is constantly overlooked in our workflow, where a simple count of the files (just like the update count next to it) would alert/remind members to review that source before scrolling through updates and then asking for the already attached file.
